home-intro.heading: About this lodge
paragraphs: The Respectable Symbolic Lodge Memento Mori No. 107 is a lodge of ancient, free and accepted Masons based in Chihuahua City, capital of the state of the same name in northern Mexico. It works in symbolic regularity under the jurisdiction of the Noble, Loyal and Centenary Grand Lodge "Cosmos" of the State of Chihuahua, with which it shares a commitment to preserve the traditions of the craft, the dignity of ritual and the philosophical work characteristic of symbolic Freemasonry in the country.

Our mission is to provide a restrained meeting place for men of integrity who wish to cultivate universal fraternity, the study of symbols and moral improvement through shared reflection and the orderly practice of the craft. Meetings take place in an atmosphere of mutual respect and discretion, without profit motive or proselytizing beyond what is recognized by the mother Grand Lodge. Voluntary association and confidentiality remain central at every stage.

Values that guide the lodge include tolerance, practical solidarity, loyalty to regular institutions and civic responsibility in Chihuahua. We believe Freemasonry contributes to the common good when members work on themselves with humility and set an example in their families, professions and communities.

Those who live in Chihuahua City or the surrounding area and seek reliable information on how to approach the Fraternity may use the channels indicated on this site. Membership inquiries are confidential and gradual; they are intended for adults who are free from external coercion and understand that Masonic commitment can only be fully grasped through the lodge’s own work. This website summarizes our institutional identity and our bond with Grand Lodge Cosmos; it does not replace the ritual experience that belongs exclusively to the temple. We welcome sincere correspondence from anyone who, after careful reflection, wishes to draw nearer to our community in Chihuahua.

contact-page.grand-lodge: Grand Lodge Cosmos of the State of Chihuahua
contact-page.hours-body: Because Masonic work is discreet by nature, specific meeting days and times are not published openly online. Those who begin a serious approach will receive guidance through the secretary’s official email or phone.

moral-code: Worship the Great Architect of the Universe.
Do not do wrong to expect good.
The true worship given to the Great Architect is good works.
Do good for love of the same good.
Always keep your soul in a pure state to appear with dignity before your consciousness.
Love the good, have compassion for the weak, shun the wicked, yet hate no one.
Speak respectfully to your superiors, prudently to your equals, sincerely to your friends, and gently to the poor.
Do not deceive your brother, it is a betrayal; and if your brother flatters fears that corrupt you.
Always listen to the voice of your conscience.
Be a father to the poor. Every sigh torn from them by your hardness will fall back upon your head as a curse.
Respect the national or foreign travelers; help him, his person is sacred to you.
Avoid quarrels, insults expected, let reason always stay on your side.
Respect women. Never take advantage of their vulnerability, and sooner die than dishonor them.

If the Great Architect of the Universe gives you a son, give thanks—but tremble at the sacred trust placed in you, for you shall henceforth be, for that child, an image of the Divine. Let him fear you until he is ten; love you until twenty; and honor you until death. Until ten, be his teacher; until twenty, his father; and until death, his friend. Teach him sound principles before fine manners; let him owe you a clear doctrine rather than frivolous polish. Better an honorable man than merely a clever one.
Read and profit, sees and mimics, think and always give attention to the good of your brothers and will work for yourself.
Be content all, by all and everything.
Do not judge lightly the actions of men, not less reproaches and blades; While prior attempts to probe hearts to appreciate his works.

ser-mason.title: Membership application
ser-mason.intro: If you live in Chihuahua or wish to begin your journey in Chihuahua City, fill out the form to submit your application to the Respectable Symbolic Lodge Memento Mori No. 107. The secretary will review your information and get in touch.

fields.name: Full name
fields.message: Message or reason for your application

ser-mason.noteBefore: Submitting will open your email client with secretaria
ser-mason.noteAfter: memento-mori.mx. Send the message to complete your application.

credits.warning: This site is a passion/side project that was built in collaboration with Ivan Sotelo and Memento Mori N.° 107.  It is a non-commercial site, and we do not make any profits. We do not claim any document accuracy on this site, there may potentially be inaccurate text.  Most of the text that are in english were translated from Spanish via Google Translate, so there may be grammatical/spelling errors.
